samples.text: All sparrows are birds. All birds are animals. Are sparrows animals?
Every member of sparrows is among birds. Every member of birds is among animals. Does it follow that sparrows are animals?
All songbirds are avians. All avians are animals. Are songbirds animals?
animals include all birds. birds include all sparrows. Therefore, are sparrows animals?
All sparrows are birds. All birds are animals. A blue car is parked outside. Are sparrows animals?
